prompt: Visualize a future scenario by adding a projected flow from STEM major to new AI specialization with distinct labels.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays a Sankey diagram of student major flows. Add a new projected flow to visualize a future scenario. This new flow should originate from the 'STEM major: 240' block on the left side of the diagram. It should then lead to a newly created block on the far right side of the diagram, positioned visually below the 'Stay STEM major: 200' block. This new block must be distinctly labeled 'AI Specialization: 40'. The connecting flow ribbon should also be clearly labeled 'To AI Specialization: 40'. Ensure the color and style of the new elements, including the font and numerical presentation, are consistent with the existing information graphics in image 1.
objects: 'STEM major: 240' block on the left side
'Stay STEM major: 200' block on the right side
Existing flow ribbons connecting major blocks
New flow ribbon originating from 'STEM major: 240', labeled 'To AI Specialization: 40'
New block on the far right, positioned below 'Stay STEM major: 200', labeled 'AI Specialization: 40'
